one_line_ask: Cut a studio-shot designer armchair out to a clean, high-res transparent PNG and deliver a small catalog-ready asset pack (color-corrected master, hero outpaint frame, platform crops, and a vector silhouette).
brief: I run a small furniture e-commerce brand and I need one of our studio product shots turned into a clean, professional cutout I can drop into any design. The supplied file is a high-resolution studio photo of a mid-century walnut-and-teal lounge armchair on a seamless light-grey backdrop. Deliverables: (1) the armchair cut out to a transparent-background PNG with a clean, halo-free edge — no grey fringe from the backdrop, attention to the legs and the gap under the armrests; (2) a color-corrected master (straightened, auto-toned, neutral white balance) so the walnut reads warm and the teal upholstery reads true; (3) a "hero" frame where the canvas is extended on both sides so the chair sits in a wider seamless studio sweep for banner use; (4) a 2048×2048 square crop and a 1080×1350 portrait crop of the cutout for catalog/social tiles; and (5) a clean two-tone vector silhouette (SVG) of the chair for use as a category icon and watermark. Bundle the PNG, the graded master, the hero frame, both crops and the SVG into one delivery folder. The cutout itself is the priority — it must be edge-accurate and design-ready; the rest is the prep we'd otherwise pay extra for.
